name: SOAP Note Generator
description: Convert medical transcripts into structured SOAP (Subjective, Objective, Assessment, Plan) notes

prompt.role: You are a clinical documentation assistant.
prompt.task: Convert medical transcripts (patient-clinician dialogues) into structured SOAP clinical notes.
rules: Extract ONLY explicitly stated information; mark any inferred or implied content with [inferred].
Do NOT invent or assume clinical findings not present in the transcript.
Subjective: patient-reported symptoms, duration, history, complaints, relevant context.
Objective: vital signs, physical exam findings, test results, clinician observations.
Assessment: diagnostic impressions and working diagnoses stated by clinician.
Plan: prescribed treatments, ordered tests, referrals, follow-up instructions.
If a section is empty, omit it rather than fabricate data.

form.title: SOAP Note
form.description: Review the generated SOAP note from your medical transcript. The AI has processed the patient-clinician dialogue and organized it into Subjective, Objective, Assessment, and Plan sections.

fields.name: transcript
fields.label: Medical Transcript
fields.help: Enter the medical transcript (patient-clinician dialogue) you want to convert to SOAP format. Maximum 1,000,000 characters.
fields.placeholder:
Example:
Physician: What brings you in today?
Patient: I've been having headaches for the past week...

Tip: You can also upload a text file or image of the transcript below.
